title: Choose Design Tools from the Question Being Tested
summary: Choose Design Tools from the Question Being Tested retrieves prior skills in an original paper wireframe interactive and coded prototype decision scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply design prototype test in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real paper wireframe interactive and coded prototype decision artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the paper wireframe interactive and coded prototype decision contract · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which practice survives changed data and devices? Scenario: paper wireframe interactive and coded prototype decision.
steps.why: Choose Design Tools from the Question Being Tested makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in paper wireframe interactive and coded prototype decision.

content.text: Prototypes answer questions at the cheapest useful fidelity. Paper or low-fidelity flows can test order and vocabulary; interactive prototypes can test navigation and feedback; coded prototypes can test real browser behavior and access constraints. A polished mockup is still a hypothesis. Test reports connect observed behavior to evidence, decisions, revisions, and remaining uncertainty. Apply it to paper wireframe interactive and coded prototype decision.
